trial_details.trajectory:
Diagnosis:
The pod is running, but the container is exposing port 5000 instead of the expected port 8080.The patch command did not fix the issue, so I will delete the pod and let Kubernetes recreate it with the correct configuration.The pod has been recreated with the correct port configuration.

FIX COMPLETE
